Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grace]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Grace possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Grace is a Truegold who is not from a prominent clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Grace is finishing up acolytes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Grace uses a long, curved steel sword that she pulls from her soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Grace's sacred instrument is getting weaker and sometimes takes a moment to activate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Grace is a member of Lindon's team and has performed well in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Grace had a cloth wrapped around a missing eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Grace is a former team member of Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Grace is a cousin of Douji and Courage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
